testsuite.name: io.github.eucsoh.analysis.RealLogsParsingTest

testcase.name: EUC World file should parse and compute positive Req()
should NOT return negative Req for EUC World()
should NOT return negative Req for WheelLog()
WheelLog file should parse and compute positive Req()
EUC World should have single datetime field()
should NOT return zero Req for valid files()
WheelLog should have reasonable datetime format()
should analyze files in reasonable time()
should extract reasonable battery pack parameters()

testsuite.system-out: 🐞 [EUC World] File: euc_world.csv Source detected: euc_world Points analyzed: 2727 Req median: 0.2010936757013803 Ω Req mean: 0.2292992775304634 Ω V_idle: 131.52900000005198 V Ns estimated: 32 Wheel km: 4059.875 km (distance_total_km_euc) 🐞 [WheelLog] File: wheellog.csv Source detected: wheellog Points analyzed: 4420 Req median: 0.05231219920485473 Ω Req mean: 0.06460792044629315 Ω V_idle: 126.91111111112131 V Ns estimated: 32 Wheel km: 7928.852 km (totaldistance_m_wl) ⏱️ wheellog.csv: 867ms for 4420 points ⏱️ euc_world.csv: 1201ms for 2727 points
